snippets.comment: Chill teacher. i did online async. she basically walks you through the lab. lots of assignments easy to fall behind. late work 20% penalty. lost of discussion posts. works with you through technical difficualties. you can tell she cares. nice person overall too

Professor Ikeda is an excellent teacher and a wonderful person. She will explain everything concisely and is always trying to help students really understand the content. I got a C in this class due to my own negligence, but Professor Ikeda gave me the guidance to pass the class when I needed it mos
